name: json-to-typst-ebook
description: A JSON-to-Typst publishing engine for AI-generated ebooks, workbooks, slide decks, and visual content.

scripts.build:example: node src/cli.mjs build --input examples/habit-design/content.json --template habit-workbook --output dist/habit-design.pdf --preview dist/pages
scripts.build:modern: node src/cli.mjs build --input examples/habit-design/content.json --template modern-workbook --output dist/habit-design-modern.pdf --preview dist/modern-pages
scripts.build:classic: node src/cli.mjs build --input examples/habit-design/content.json --template classic-textbook --output dist/habit-design-classic.pdf --preview dist/classic-pages
scripts.build:modern-classic: node src/cli.mjs build --input examples/habit-design/content.json --template modern-classic-textbook --output dist/habit-design-modern-classic.pdf --preview dist/modern-classic-pages
scripts.build:minimal: node src/cli.mjs build --input node_modules/@mongmx/ai-flywheel-content-schemas/examples/ebook-minimal.json --template habit-workbook --output dist/minimal.pdf --preview dist/minimal-pages
scripts.build:slides: node src/cli.mjs build-slides --input examples/layout-as-code-slides/content.json --template quiet-power-slides --output dist/layout-as-code-slides.pdf --preview dist/layout-as-code-slides-pages
scripts.build:poster: node src/cli.mjs build-slides --input examples/poster-design/content.json --template quiet-power-slides --output dist/poster-design.pdf --preview dist/poster-design-pages
